title: Portability Violation Event
description: Emitted when an EHBG §12 portability rule (P-1 through P-7) is detected as violated in a pilot-slice repo — e.g. a @supabase/supabase-js import (P-1), Supabase Auth SDK instead of IAuthProvider (P-2), an edge function holding business logic (P-4), or a @vercel/* import (P-5). Detected by the authoring agent, the per-repo PR-merge hook, or the Orchestrator. A blocking violation must gate the PR (no merge).

repo.description: owner/repo where the violation was detected

violation_detail.description: Offending import / pattern + file:line where possible

detected_by.description: Agent / hook / orchestrator that detected it

blocking.description: True when the violation must gate the PR merge
